title: Multimodal Embeddings — Gemini Embedding 2 for Semantic Search
description: Can Gemini Embedding 2's natively multimodal embeddings enable semantic and cross-modal search across archival family photos and documents without requiring prior Claude Vision analysis?
key_findings: Text-to-image retrieval works: precision@1 = 0.70, precision@5 ≈ 0.50 on family queries
Image-to-image similarity is strong: distances 0.07-0.18 within thematic clusters
768d Matryoshka retains 90% top-1 agreement vs 3072d baseline — 4.5x faster, 4x smaller
Embedding clusters discover visual themes (weddings, indoor family) invisible to structured metadata
Zero overlap between embedding clusters and synthesis entities — complementary, not competing
Cost is $0 (free tier). Full corpus (10k photos) embeddable in ~3 hours
macOS Python needs apsw for sqlite-vec (OMIT_LOAD_EXTENSION in stdlib sqlite3)
